title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!
